templates.text: You spent ₹{amount} on {merchant} this month. That's {equivalent} plates of dal chawal your mom makes for free 🫠
Food delivery apps should give you a loyalty crown. ₹{amount} in {count} orders. Your kitchen is gathering dust 🍳
₹{amount} on food delivery. The delivery guy knows your address better than your friends do 🏍️
₹{amount} on cabs this month. At this rate, buy a cycle — it pays for itself in 2 months 🚲
You spent ₹{amount} on cab rides. That's {equivalent} months of metro pass 🚇
₹{amount} on shopping. Your wardrobe is growing faster than your savings account 👗
Online shopping got ₹{amount} from you in {count} orders. Uninstall the app for a week. Dare you 📦
Fri-Sun you spent ₹{amount}. That's {percent}% of your weekly spend in just 2 days. Weekends are expensive friends 🎉
Your midnight cravings cost ₹{amount} this month. Nothing good happens after 10pm — especially to your wallet 🌙
₹{amount} on late-night orders. Your 11pm self is sabotaging your savings goals 😴
Day 1 after salary: ₹{amount} gone. Rich for 3 days, broke for 27. The classic cycle 💸
You spent {percent}% of your salary in the first 3 days. Maybe hide your UPI app on payday? 🙈
You're paying ₹{amount}/month for {count} subscriptions. {merchant} — when did you last open it? 👻
₹{amount}/month in subscriptions = ₹{equivalent}/year. That's a weekend trip to Goa. Just saying ✈️
₹{amount} on coffee this month. You're basically funding someone's MBA at the café ☕
Coffee count: {count} cups bought outside. A French press costs ₹1,500 and pays for itself in a week ☕
ATM charges: ₹{amount}. You're literally paying to access your own money. Switch to UPI 🏧
Actually… you did well this week! Only ₹{amount} spent with {percent}% in needs. Proud of you 🌟
Savings rate: {percent}%. You're in the top 20% of responsible spenders in India. Keep going 🏆
₹{amount} under budget! That's {equivalent} extra chai breaks you earned guilt-free ☕
This week: {count} transactions, ₹{amount} spent. That's ₹{equivalent} per transaction. Lots of small buys add up! 🔢
You made {count} purchases this week. That's {equivalent} times you said 'yes' to spending. How many were necessary? 🤔
Food outside: ₹{amount}. Average home meal cost: ₹80. You could've eaten {equivalent} home meals instead 🏠
₹{amount} on entertainment. Your future self watching you from 2030: 'Could've been in my mutual fund' 📈
EMIs eating {percent}% of your income. You're working {days} days/month just to pay past purchases 📅
You made {count} purchases under ₹200 this week. Small leaks sink big ships — total: ₹{amount} 💧
{category} is {percent}% of all spending. That one category is eating your budget alive 🐛
This month vs last month: {percent}% more. What changed? Let's find the leak 🔍
This month: {percent}% less than last month! Whatever you're doing, keep doing it! 📉✅
Festive month damage: ₹{amount} over budget. The festivals are over but the credit card bill isn't 🎆
{merchant} increased from ₹{amount} to ₹{equivalent}. Sneaky price hike! Time to re-evaluate? 📈
You've paid ₹{amount} to {merchant} for {days} days without using it. That's a ghost subscription 👻
Weekday you: ₹{amount}/day. Weekend you: ₹{equivalent}/day. They're different people 🎭
Your spending peaks at {equivalent}pm. That's when your willpower is lowest. Schedule a walk instead! 🚶
₹{amount} left. {days} days to payday. That's ₹{equivalent}/day. Choose wisely 🎯
You crossed ₹{amount} in monthly savings! That's {equivalent} months ahead. Financial freedom loading… ⏳
Welcome to your first weekly roast! You spent ₹{amount} across {count} transactions. Let's see how next week goes 👀
{days} no-spend days this month! Each one saved you an average ₹{amount}. Total saved: ₹{equivalent} 🏅
Auto-debits hit today: ₹{amount} across {count} services. Review: do you use all of them? 🤖
Groceries: ₹{amount}. Pro tip: Buy in bulk on weekdays (cheaper), avoid weekend supermarket impulse buys 🛒
₹{amount} on health this month. Good investment! But check if a health insurance plan covers any of this 💊
You paid {count} group bills this month (₹{amount}). Friendly reminder: it's okay to ask people to pay their share 🤝
You visited {merchant} {count} times in {days} days. VIP customer! But also ₹{amount} poorer 🏪
Your biggest expense this month: ₹{amount} on {merchant}. Was it planned? If not, what triggered it? 🧠
A 2AM food order for ₹{amount}. At that hour, a glass of water and sleep are both free and healthier 😴
Daily average: ₹{amount}. That's ₹{equivalent}/year. Visualize ₹{equivalent} in cash. Scary, right? 💰
Spending down {percent}% from last week! Your wallet is smiling. Keep this up! 😊📉
Spending up {percent}% from last week. Not a disaster, but let's course-correct before month-end ⚡
You spent ₹{amount} on {category}. That's {equivalent} movie tickets. Was it as entertaining? 🎬
You spent ₹{amount} on impulse buys this month. Same amount could feed a family for {days} days. Perspective! 🙏
